/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/particles.dir/particles.c.o CMakeFiles/particles.dir/__/deps/tinycthread.c.o CMakeFiles/particles.dir/__/deps/getopt.c.o CMakeFiles/particles.dir/__/deps/glad_gl.c.o -o ../../../bin/particles.app/Contents/MacOS/particles  ../../../lib/libglfw3.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
